description: Add group selection UI to the RuleEditorDialog. Show a section with checkboxes listing all known groups (from KnownGroupRepository) when the rule's scope is GROUPS_ONLY or ALL. Users can check/uncheck groups. If none are checked, the rule applies to all groups (current behavior). Modify RulesViewModel and RulesScreen to pass known groups data to the editor.
steps: Modify app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/ui/rules/RulesViewModel.kt: Add a dependency on KnownGroupRepository (constructor parameter). Add a StateFlow<List<KnownGroup>> property 'knownGroups' that collects from knownGroupRepository.groups with stateIn(). Import KnownGroup domain model.
Modify app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/ui/AppViewModelFactory.kt: Update the RulesViewModel instantiation to pass container.knownGroupRepository as the third parameter.

Modify app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/ui/rules/RuleEditorDialog.kt: (1) Add a parameter knownGroups: List<KnownGroup> to the RuleEditorDialog composable. (2) Add state: var selectedGroupIds by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.allowedGroupIds ?: emptySet()) }. (3) After the 'Aplicar a' (scope) section, add a new section visible only when scope is GROUPS_ONLY or ALL: Title 'Grupos permitidos' with a subtitle '(vacio = todos los grupos)'. Show a scrollable Column/LazyColumn with each KnownGroup as a Row with Checkbox + group name + package name hint. Checking/unchecking toggles the group's ID in selectedGroupIds. (4) In the onSave lambda, include allowedGroupIds = if (scope == ReplyScope.INDIVIDUAL_ONLY) emptySet() else selectedGroupIds in the rule copy.
Modify app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/ui/rules/RulesScreen.kt: (1) Collect knownGroups from the viewModel as state. (2) Pass the knownGroups list to RuleEditorDialog when showing it.
acceptance_criteria: RuleEditorDialog shows a group selection section when scope is ALL or GROUPS_ONLY
Group selection section shows checkboxes with group names from known groups
When scope is INDIVIDUAL_ONLY, allowedGroupIds is cleared to emptySet
When no groups are selected, the saved rule has allowedGroupIds = emptySet (applies to all)
Editing an existing rule with allowedGroupIds pre-selects those groups in the checkboxes
verification: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug and confirm it succeeds with exit code 0
findings: Build successful. All acceptance criteria met. The group selection UI integrates smoothly into the existing AlertDialog pattern. Used a nested scrollable Column for the group list to avoid the dialog becoming too tall.
